jobDescription.description: The interview question or job description context for evaluation
jobDescription.example: Tell me about a time you handled a conflict in your team.

resume.description: The candidate's resume or background information
resume.example: 5 years of experience in software engineering, worked at XYZ company...

userAnswer.description: The candidate's interview answer to be evaluated
userAnswer.example: In my previous role, I encountered a situation where two team members disagreed on the technical approach...
